description_long: This object represents a highly stylized adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a slender, abstract body. The figure appears to be in a dynamic, crouched or lunging pose, with one knee bent and the other leg extended far behind. The head is adorned with a long, textured ponytail, and the body is clad in tight-fitting attire that accentuates the elongated form. The arms are also extremely long, with one arm reaching forward and the other trailing behind, both ending in simplified hand shapes. The overall appearance is surreal and artistic, with a focus on fluid, sweeping lines and minimal anatomical detail.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian in a dynamic crouched pose with a long ponytail and tight-fitting attire, featuring exaggerated limbs and minimal detail.
description_view_0: The figure's head and ponytail are visible, with the right arm and bent leg prominent in the foreground.
description_view_1: The elongated left arm and leg are most visible, showing the extreme length and dynamic stretch of the pose.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is shown, highlighting the ponytail and the extended rear leg.
description_view_3: The lower body and both legs are visible, emphasizing the crouched stance and the sweeping lines of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with long sleeves and leggings
attribute_posture: crouching with one leg extended and one arm reaching forward
